title: Japan Props
description: The Japan Props mod for Minecraft introduces a range of Japanese street props to enhance the realism of your Minecraft world. With items such as traffic cones, bicycle barriers, traffic lights, and more.
body:
# Japan Props A Minecraft mod that brings Japanese street props to your world, adding realism and detail to urban landscapes. From traffic cones and bicycle barriers to traffic lights and zebra crossings, this mod introduces a variety of props commonly found on Japanese streets. Whether you're building a bustling city or a quiet suburban neighborhood, these props will enhance the authenticity of your environment.
--- ## Version 0.0.3.3 — Fabric/Quilt Update Be careful, there may be some problems running in Minecraft versions 1.20, 1.20.2, 1.20.3, and 1.20.4. There may also be compatibility issues with certain mods and loaders. If you want to avoid problems, it is recommended to run on game version **1.20.1**. --- ## Items - Traffic Cone - Bicycle Barrier - Traffic Light - Zebra Crossing - Vertical Pole - Horizontal Pole - Curved Pole - Sign "for Bicycles" - Smooth Stone Brick - Speed Bump --- ## Update Log **Version 0.0.1** - Added Smooth Stone Brick (`smooth_stone_brick.json`) - Added Speed Bump (`speed_bump.json`) - Next: version 0.0.1-alpha --- ## Credits - Images used for props are from [Complementary Shaders](https://www.complementary.dev/) - This work is licensed under **Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International** --- ## Notes - Release versions are published on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/japan-props) - Alpha and testing versions are published on Modrinth - Development of version 1.12.2 is currently delayed — please wait a while
